findings.title: SSH: PermitRootLogin enabled
findings.description: SSH allows direct root login, which is a security risk.
findings.remediation: Set 'PermitRootLogin no' in /etc/ssh/sshd_config and restart sshd.

findings.title: SSH: PasswordAuthentication enabled
findings.description: SSH allows password-based login. Key-based auth is more secure.

findings.title: SSH: Protocol version OK
findings.description: SSH uses protocol version 2 (default in modern OpenSSH).

findings.title: SSH: X11Forwarding enabled
findings.description: X11 forwarding can be exploited for display hijacking.

findings.title: Sudoers: No NOPASSWD entries
findings.description: No NOPASSWD entries found in sudoers configuration.

findings.title: Firewall: No active firewall detected
findings.description: No active firewall (UFW, firewalld, iptables) was detected.
findings.remediation: Install and enable a firewall: sudo apt install ufw && sudo ufw enable

findings.title: No risky services enabled
findings.description: No known risky services are enabled.

findings.title: Automatic updates: not configured
findings.description: No automatic security update mechanism detected.
findings.remediation: Install and configure unattended-upgrades (Debian/Ubuntu) or dnf-automatic (RHEL).

findings.title: Password policy: not configured
findings.description: No password minimum length policy found.

findings.title: ASLR: fully enabled
findings.description: ASLR is set to full randomization (2).

top_remediation.title: SSH: PermitRootLogin enabled
top_remediation.remediation: Set 'PermitRootLogin no' in /etc/ssh/sshd_config and restart sshd.

top_remediation.title: Firewall: No active firewall detected
top_remediation.remediation: Install and enable a firewall: sudo apt install ufw && sudo ufw enable

top_remediation.title: Automatic updates: not configured
top_remediation.remediation: Install and configure unattended-upgrades (Debian/Ubuntu) or dnf-automatic (RHEL).
